title: Water Minecart
description: "I wanna pour water into the cart…"
body:
_Interactive stress-relief mod that lets you pour water into a minecart._ 

**Features**

- Fill and collect water using a bucket

- Ride a water-filled minecart to extinguish oneself

- Endermen and Blazes take damage when in contact with the water-filled minecart

- The Minecart with Water item is available in the Transportation tab
 

**Item/Entity Name:**

water_minecart
